# Delicate Repair — Therapy and Counselling Services

> Trauma is real and heavy, but it can be carried. You don't have to carry that all alone anymore.

## About
Delicate Repair is a trauma-informed therapy service founded by Khushi, a trauma-informed therapist based in India. The service specialises in helping people heal from trauma, anxiety, attachment wounds, addiction, and complex emotional patterns. The approach integrates evidence-based models, including EMDR, Internal Family Systems (IFS), CBT, and somatic-focused approaches, to honor and regulate the nervous system. Treatment is conducted online via video call across India.

## Main Website & Navigation
- **Home:** [https://delicaterepair.com/](https://delicaterepair.com/)

## Services Offered
- **[Trauma Therapy](https://delicaterepair.com/services/trauma-therapy.html):** Helping clients process trauma, reduce hypervigilance, and find safety.
- **[EMDR Therapy](https://delicaterepair.com/services/emdr.html):** Eye Movement Desensitization and Reprocessing for trauma-focused healing of "stuck" experiences.
- **[Internal Family Systems (IFS)](https://delicaterepair.com/services/ifs.html):** A powerful approach for complex trauma (C-PTSD), dissociation, and dissociative disorders.
- **[Couples' Therapy](https://delicaterepair.com/services/couples-therapy.html):** Assisting partners in understanding underlying dynamics to build intentional relationships.
- **[Counselling for Addiction](https://delicaterepair.com/services/addiction-counselling.html):** A trauma and attachment-informed approach exploring the pain driving addiction.
- **[Counselling for Depression](https://delicaterepair.com/services/depression-counselling.html):** Reducing depressive symptoms, understanding neurobiological factors, and regaining agency.
- **[Counselling for Anxiety](https://delicaterepair.com/services/anxiety-counselling.html):** Addressing generalised anxiety, social anxiety, health anxiety, panic attacks, and phobias.
- **[Eating Disorders](https://delicaterepair.com/services/eating-disorders.html):** Compassionate support to reduce symptoms and rebuild trust with one's body.

Specialties include: Addiction, C-PTSD, Eating Disorders, Abuse (Sexual, Emotional, Physical), Relationship & Family Therapy, Trauma, Depression, Anxiety, EMDR / IFS, CBT, Body Image, Enmeshment Trauma, LGBTQ+ Affirmative Therapy, Mood Disorders, Boundaries & Communication.

## Contact Information

- **Location:** Online — India

## Policies Overview
- **Confidentiality:** Strict confidentiality is maintained with limits only as required by law (e.g., imminent risk of harm). Digital records are encrypted.
- **Cancellations:** 24 hours' notice required for regular sessions. 48 hours for sessions booked 5-7 days in advance or recurring slots. Maximum of two reschedules per appointment. Latency over 20 minutes counts as a cancellation.
- **Refunds:** Full refund (minus admin fees) if cancelled with sufficient notice. No refunds for late cancellations or conducted sessions.
